svg.style: background: white; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
svg.title: Student Services Assistant on Azure
svg.desc: Students use a web application hosted in Azure Container Apps. A deterministic safety router runs before Azure AI Search retrieval and Microsoft Foundry model calls. Approved university content grounds cited answers, managed identity provides RBAC access, sensitive requests escalate to staff, and Azure Monitor services collect minimal telemetry.

g.text: FastAPI + web UI; safety router first
